state.title: KuikChat - AI-Powered Communication Platform | Privacy-First Messaging
state.bodyText:
KuikChat
Features
Privacy
Apps
About
Sign In
Get Started
Now with Hermes AI built-in.
Chat smarter,
work faster.

KuikChat is a real-time messaging platform: AI-powered assistants, secure file tools, and interactive cards are all built right in. Use it on the web, your desktop, or your mobile device.

Start for free
Download the app
Powerful Features
Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't

From AI-powered conversations to ironclad security, KuikChat has it all.

Ask AI

Inline assistant for real-time answers, coding help, and creative brainstorming.

AI Art Studio

Generate stunning images from text prompts directly in your conversations.

Multimodal Live Call

Real-time voice/video with AI that sees and hears, powered by cutting-edge models.

Smart Translation

One-tap translation supporting English, Spanish, German, French, Hindi, and Chinese.

Vanish Mode

Dark UI with messages that disappear after being read. Complete privacy.

Screenshot Alerts

Real-time notifications whenever so
